calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Ofelia Sappington To Perpetuate Testimony Of Thomas Sappington By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES via CourtCall:
Solomon Pantuch of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3200) specially appearing for intervenors for Marconi Plastering Company.
Charles S. Park of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), specially appearing for defendant Foster Wheeler LLC.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Ofelia Sappington to Perpetuate Testimony of Thomas Sappington by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 2035.010. Petitioner filed proofs of service as to all prospective defendants named in the petition. The Court did not consider the opposition by Air & Liquid Systems Corporation, as Successor by Merger to Buffalo Pumps, Inc. as it was untimely filed. (Code Civ. Proc. Section 1005(b).) All parties must file a Notice of Special Appearance within two court days upon receipt of this order. The deposition is to take place by Zoom technology within 30 days of this order unless the parties agree otherwise. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
